requiredCommonPolicyPhrases: Do not ask the user to write `--quality`, `--model`, or `--effort` unless troubleshooting the plugin itself.
Do not substitute strong local Claude routing with `claude ultrareview`; ultrareview requires the claude-ultrareview skill and explicit cost confirmation.

claude-review: Default to `--quality auto` for manual Claude review, plan, rescue, and multi-review unless the command documents a stricter default.
claude-multi-review: Default to `--quality auto` for manual Claude review, plan, rescue, and multi-review unless the command documents a stricter default.
claude-adversarial-review: Default to `--quality auto` for manual Claude review, plan, rescue, and multi-review unless the command documents a stricter default.
claude-plan: Default to `--quality auto` for manual Claude review, plan, rescue, and multi-review unless the command documents a stricter default.
claude-plan-review: Use this skill when the user asks Claude to review, challenge, audit, approve, or adversarially inspect a saved implementation plan file.
claude-rescue: Default to `--quality auto` for manual Claude review, plan, rescue, and multi-review unless the command documents a stricter default.
claude-github-actions-review: Default generated workflows to `--quality standard` even if the local environment requests stronger manual review.
claude-role-packs: Keep Codex responsible for reconciling Claude output before edits.
claude-collaboration-loop: Keep Codex responsible for reconciling Claude output before edits.
claude-assisted-review: Keep Codex responsible for reconciling Claude output before edits.
claude-review-gate: Installed Stop hooks stay conservative and do not force `--quality strong`, `--quality max`, SDK backend, SDK subagents, or ultrareview.
claude-subagent-review: The child must not replace the plugin call with raw `claude -p`.

plugins/claude-for-codex/README.md: Users can ask for Claude in natural language
Codex maps the request to Claude for Codex quality, model, effort, backend, role, and background-job arguments
Generic strict or strong language never selects ultrareview
docs/README.en.md: Generic strict or strong review language never selects ultrareview
docs/README.zh-CN.md: Claude 自然语言路由规则：
普通的严格或强审阅表达不会自动选择 ultrareview
